claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a calibrated leakage model, threshold estimate, new code, hardware result, or full shot-conditioned erasure decoder.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Under a Stim generated rotated-surface-code memory circuit with tick-level DEPOLARIZE1 versus HERALDED_ERASE leakage proxies, the heralded-erasure proxy can lower Wilson target-volume pressure on some d=5/d=7 rows after a declared flag-overhead penalty.

title: B2 Stim heralded-erasure leakage stress
toolchain: Stim HERALDED_ERASE / DEPOLARIZE1 plus PyMatching detector-error-model decoder
